hero.description: HopeFlow connects blood donors, charity volunteers, and aid recipients during emergencies. Register online, receive your q-card, and help save lives in your community.

footer.description: Saving lives through blood donation. Join our mission to help those in need.

simpleProcess.title: How HopeFlow Works
simpleProcess.description: We've streamlined the donation process so you can help faster with less hassle — no long queues, no confusion.

step1.title: Register Online
step1.description: Fill in your details and complete a quick health survey from the comfort of your home.

step2.title: Receive Queue Number
step2.description: Get a unique queue number sent directly to your email — no app required.

step3.title: Visit the Center
step3.description: Arrive at your chosen donation center at your scheduled time — no waiting in line.

step4.title: Make Your Impact
step4.description: Your donation is processed and reaches those in need within hours of your visit.

alert.title: Critical Blood Shortage — Type O- Urgently Needed
alert.description: Eastern Province hospitals are facing severe shortages. Eligible donors are needed immediately.

emergency.heading: Emergency Campaigns
emergency.subheading: Your contribution — whether blood funds, food, or time — makes a direct impact on communities in crisis.

blood.title: Blood Drive — Eastern Province Crisis Response
blood.subtitle: Currently in surgery or ICU care.

food.title: Flood Relief — Emergency Food & Clothing Drive
food.subtitle: Families are displaced following the southern floods.

medical.title: Pediatric Ward Medical Supply Campaign
medical.subtitle: Children's hospitals are facing critical shortages.
